title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What area of science do you find most fascinating? Why?
Do you think we should invest more in space exploration?
Have any recent scientific discoveries impressed or surprised you?
Do you think technology is advancing too fast?
What do you think will be the most important scientific breakthrough of our time?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think the benefits of scientific progress always outweigh the risks?
Should there be ethical limits on what scientists are allowed to research?
How important is it that the public understands scientific discoveries?
